details.test: Task 1: Cheapest evening wash & fold pickup with ≤2-day delivery
Task 2: Choose cheaper eligible wool coat option (≤3-day turnaround)
Task 3: Monthly wash & fold subscription up to 30 lbs, Tuesday evenings
Task 4: Mixed shirts/suits/dresses order from calculator under $80
Task 5: Set nearest branch within 5 miles open until ≥20:00 as preferred
Task 6: Three stain-related add-ons (<$5) and cheapest ≤3-day delivery
Task 7: Same-day express dry cleaning for suits & shirts with morning pickup
Task 8: Ironing-only for 8 items next Saturday morning with instructions
Task 9: Missing-items policy and submit contact form about missing item
